calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Continued To Oct-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward J. Rodzewich, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Renter, (510-457-3460), for Alan Abruzzo, Sara Corbett, Tiya-B Nucci and Loft and Garden, Inc., Defendants and moving parties.
Mark Hooshmand, Esq. (415-318-5709), for Kelly Rafferty, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court indicates that he finds the complaint insufficient and allegations in the complaint tries to avoid statute of limitations. Plaintiff's counsel indicates that parties has stipulation that Discovery is interchangeable. Defendant's counsel responds that the stipulation cited is not an issue in today's hearing.

Court hears arguments from both sides. The following citation of cases are brought up in open court: Sylve vs. Riley and 192 Cal App 805. Defendant requests ruling to be without leave to amend as to all causes of action.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANTS ALAN ABRUZZO, SARA CORBETT, TIYA-B NUCCI and LOFT AND GARDEN, INC. AKA LOFTANDGARDEN.COM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Both sides submit proposed orders in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Continued To Aug-05-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Victoria E. Townsend, Esq. of Stratman et al LLC, (510-457-3462), for Alan Abruzzo, Sara Corbett, Tiya-B Nucci and Loft and Garden Inc., Defendants and moving parties.
Mark Hooshmand, Esq. (415-318-5709), for Kelly Rafferty, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Reporter Judith DeAlba, CSR #5709, (650-571-1473).

Clarification on the plaintiff's opposition which were filed on March 26, 2015 are stated on the record. After hearing the clarification, Court accepts the filing of opposition as timely. Court hears the arguments from both sides. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANTs ALAN ABRUZZO, SARA CORBETT, TIYA-B NUCCI, LOFT AND GARDEN, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Both sides submit proposed order in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Judith DeAlba, CSR #5709, (650-571-1473), D501.
